label: q8_t16_decode_probes_rejected_dual_q4km_q4ks
scope: Task #2 dense/shared GGUF Q8_0 T16 decode GEMV probes. Requirement: retain only if acceptable for both Q4_K_M and Q4_K_S.

validation.targeted_tests_after_each_probe: HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. uv run pytest tests/test_gguf_q8_0_t16_gemv_decode.py tests/test_gguf_linear_dispatch.py -q

probes.name: T16_K_VEC4_scale_amortization
probes.change: Temporary vectorized K loop grouped four adjacent K lanes per thread to amortize the 16 fp16 Q8_0 T16 scale loads without lane0 shuffles.
probes.reason: Q4_K_S 4K/128 decode regressed before the Q4_K_M gate was attempted.

probes.name: scalar_fmaf_instruction_selection
probes.change: Temporary scalar-loop replacement of acc += xv * (d * q) with fmaf(xv, d * q, acc).
probes.reason: Q4_K_S was slightly positive, but Q4_K_M did not clear the dual-column gate on the 3-run 4K/128 measurement.

final_source_state: All temporary Q8_0 T16 changes reverted; git diff for hipengine/kernels/hip_gfx1100/quant/gguf_q8_0_t16_gemv.hip is empty after probes.
decision: No dense Q8_0 T16 decode change retained. Next decode-gap work should prioritize structural MoE fusion/launch reduction rather than local scalar Q8_0 tweaks.
